cases.title: TS-33: TrainingOfficeAdmin CSV export returns UTF-8 CSV with required columns and audit log
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export permission
Admin has viewed filtered report for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 in June 2026 (AC-13a Given)
Closed sessions with mixed attendance (Present, Absent, Excused) exist for that filter scope
At least one Present record includes checkedInAt timestamp
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert Content-Disposition attachment header with filename attendance-export-YYYY-MM-DD.csv per API design §8.3
Parse CSV and assert header row contains institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at in order
Assert data rows reflect attendance records within filter scope with checked_in_at populated for Present rows and empty or absent for Absent/Excused
Query ExportAuditLog and assert entry with actor adminId, filterSummary, and row count matching exported rows
cases.expected: AC-13a satisfied: admin CSV download succeeds with spec columns and export action audit-logged per testing-plan TS-33

cases.title: TS-32: Student POST /reports/export returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:export or report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Attendance data exists for export-eligible class-subject filters
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode ExportNotAllowed per API design §8.3
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b and roles-permissions §2.5
Assert response body is not text/csv and contains no attendance data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created with actor studentId and denial reason per error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-32 satisfied for Student: CSV export rejected with 403 Forbidden, localized permission message, and denied attempt logged per AC-13b and BR-09

cases.title: ExportService.exportCsv produces CSV rows with spec columns from PostgreSQL attendance read model
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed sessions, enrollments, and attendance records for HESD-01 / SWE-101
ExportService wired with attendance and session read models per reporting-export module §2.6
TrainingOfficeAdmin userId available as actor context
steps: Seed attendance records with known institutionalId, displayName, classCode, subjectCode, sessionDate, status Present/Absent/Excused, and checkedInAt for Present rows
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, adminId)
Assert returned FileStream or buffer parses as UTF-8 CSV
Assert CSV header columns exactly match institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at per API design §8.3
Assert each data row maps correctly from attendance_records join enrollments and sessions
Assert rows outside filter date range or class-subject are excluded
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: CSV export columns match spec and row data sourced from real DB transaction per tag-specific integration hint

cases.title: Successful export writes ExportAuditLog with actor, filterSummary, and row count
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance data for export filters
ExportService and audit logger append-only per reporting-export §2.6
No prior ExportAuditLog for test actor in filter scope
steps: Record ExportAuditLog row count before export
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv(filters, actorId) for TrainingOfficeAdmin or assigned Instructor and capture returned row count
Query ExportAuditLog table for new entry with actorId matching actor
Assert stored filterSummary JSON contains classCode, subjectCode, and date range matching request filters per domain model §3.12
Assert stored rowCount matches number of CSV data rows exported
Assert exportedAt timestamp is within test transaction window per testing-plan §5 ExportAuditLog suite
cases.expected: Export action audit-logged on success with actor, filterSummary, and rowCount per AC-13a, AC-13c, error-handling §6.2, and tag-specific integration hint

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 200 with CSV attachment response envelope
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Closed session attendance data exists within requested filter range
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } and admin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert Content-Disposition attachment; filename="attendance-export-<date>.csv" per API design §8.3
Assert response body is raw CSV text (not JSON envelope) with header row as first line
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for POST /reports/export per API design §8.3; CSV file stream returned to client

cases.title: Instructor POST /reports/export for assigned class-subject returns scoped CSV and audit log
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read per API design §8.3
Closed sessions with attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101 within June 2026 filter range
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Parse CSV and assert header columns match API design §8.3
Assert all data rows have class_code HESD-01 and subject_code SWE-101 only (BR-08 assignment scope)
Query ExportAuditLog and assert entry with actor instructorId, filterSummary, and row count matching exported rows per AC-13c
cases.expected: AC-13c satisfied: instructor scoped CSV export succeeds for assigned class-subject with audit log per BR-08, BR-09, and API design §8.3

cases.title: Student POST /reports/export rejected with localized message and no data leak
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:export or report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Attendance data exists in system for other students
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode ExportNotAllowed per API design §8.3
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Assert response contains no peer attendance or roster data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created per error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: AC-13b satisfied for Student: export rejected with localized message; denied attempt logged per tag-specific rbac-negative hint

cases.title: Flow A step 7: Admin exports CSV after workshop session close
preconditions: Flow A completed through step 6: roster seeded, session created with GPS, opened, student checked in Present, instructor closed session
TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with filters matching the closed workshop session classCode, subjectCode, and session date
Assert HTTP 200 and CSV downloaded
Assert exported row for checked-in student shows attendance_status Present with checked_in_at populated
Assert ExportAuditLog entry created for admin export action
Confirm Flow A step 7 per testing-plan §6 tags AC-13, FR-13
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes successful admin CSV export after session close per testing-plan §6 Flow A

cases.title: Flow D: Instructor in-scope export 200, out-of-scope export 403, admin export 200 with audit
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read
TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
Closed session with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 and separate data in unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
steps: Instructor A POST /reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters and assert HTTP 200 with scoped CSV per AC-13c
Instructor A POST /reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 filters and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with localized permission error per BR-08
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /reports/export for HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters and assert HTTP 200 with valid CSV
Assert ExportAuditLog written for instructor in-scope success and admin success; ExportDenied for instructor out-of-scope attempt
Confirm Flow D reporting authorization per testing-plan §6 tags AC-12, AC-13, BR-09
cases.expected: Flow D reporting authorization: instructor in-scope export succeeds with audit; out-of-scope denied; admin export succeeds with audit per BR-08, BR-09, and AC-13c

cases.title: Admin CSV export respects filtered report scope (class, subject, date range)
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Attendance data for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102 in June 2026
Sessions outside date range exist in May 2026 for boundary contrast
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 }
Assert HTTP 200 and parse CSV rows
Assert all rows have class_code HESD-01 and subject_code SWE-101
Assert session_date values fall within from/to inclusive range
Assert no rows from HESD-02 / SWE-102 or sessions outside June 2026 appear
Compare row count to GET /reports/summary for same filters and assert consistency per 14-listing §10.1 export uses same filter params as report API
cases.expected: Tag-specific e2e hint: admin CSV download succeeds with filtered report scope only; export mirrors active report filters per AC-13a and FR-13

cases.title: POST /reports/export with from after to returns 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export
Valid classCode and subjectCode
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-30, to: 2026-06-01 }
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Assert field-level detail for from/to date range per validation-rules §3.8 and error-handling §2.1
Assert response is not text/csv and no ExportAuditLog success entry created
cases.expected: Invalid export filter boundary rejected with ValidationFailed; no CSV payload or success audit on malformed date range

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin configures filters on /admin/export, confirms, and downloads CSV
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Closed sessions with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 for June 2026
Admin sidebar shows Xuất CSV navigation per page-list §5.6
steps: Navigate to /admin/export
Set class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, and date range 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar (same filter model as /admin/reports per 14-listing §10.2)
Verify CsvExportPanel transitions through Estimating then Ready states with estimated row count from dry-run HEAD request per ui-states §12
Verify Xuất CSV button enabled when estimated rows > 0
Click Xuất CSV to open ConfirmDialog showing scope summary and compliance note: Dữ liệu xuất chỉ dùng cho mục đích học vụ. Mọi lần xuất được ghi nhật ký. per forms-validation §4.8
Confirm export in dialog and verify Exporting state (button loading; prevent navigation)
Wait for browser download and verify success toast Đã tải xuống per ui-states §12
Open downloaded attendance-export CSV and verify header columns institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at
cases.expected: AC-13a browser journey: admin dedicated /admin/export confirm flow → CSV download with required columns per page-list §5.6 and 14-listing §10.2

cases.title: Student report pages show no Xuất CSV control and export API denied
preconditions: Authenticated Student on desktop viewport
Student has personal attendance history records
Student routes (/history) lack report:export and report:read per page-list §2 and 14-listing §10
steps: Navigate to /history and verify page toolbar contains no Xuất CSV button per AC-13b and 14-listing §10
Verify student layout nav omits /admin/export and /admin/reports links per BR-09 and page-list
If export API invoked directly from client tooling, verify modal or error displays message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu with admin contact hint per error-handling §7
Verify no CSV file download initiated from student UI
Verify no peer attendance data exposed on student-facing pages
cases.expected: AC-13b UI journey: student sees no export control on report-facing pages; export denied with localized Vietnamese message per tag-specific rbac-negative hint

cases.title: CSV export row count exceeds report table pageSize boundary and includes all filter-matched rows
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
75 attendance records seeded for HESD-01 / SWE-101 between 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-30 (exceeds report table pageSize 50 per 14-listing §6)
Known total matching attendance row count recorded before export
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 }
Assert HTTP status 200 OK and parse CSV data rows (exclude header)
Assert exported row count equals 75 and is greater than pageSize 50 boundary
Assert no truncation at page boundary — rows that would appear only on page 2 of a 50-row paginated table are present in CSV
Compare exported row count to CsvExportPanel estimated row count from dry-run (14-listing §10.2 step 2) and assert totals match
cases.expected: Pagination invariant: CSV export returns full filter scope across page boundaries; export not capped at UI report table pageSize 50 per 14-listing §6 and §10

cases.title: POST /reports/export with date range exceeding 366 days returns 422 ValidationFailed
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export
Valid classCode HESD-01 and subjectCode SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2025-01-01, to: 2026-06-29 } (range 545 days, exceeds max 366 per validation-rules §3.8)
Assert HTTP status 422 Unprocessable Entity
Assert response errorCode ValidationFailed
Assert field-level detail for from/to date range max span
Assert response is not text/csv and no ExportAuditLog success entry created
cases.expected: Export filter date range boundary enforced at 366 days; malformed span rejected with ValidationFailed per validation-rules §3.8

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin clicks inline Xuất CSV on /admin/reports without navigating to /admin/export
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Multiple cohorts with Closed sessions in June 2026 date range
Populated institution-wide report after ReportFilterBar applied per AC-13d Given
steps: Navigate to /admin/reports (not /admin/export)
Set date filter from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 and apply filters matching on-screen report
Verify page header or toolbar displays enabled Xuất CSV button per AC-13d and page-list §5.5
Click Xuất CSV without navigating away from /admin/reports
Verify POST /reports/export request body mirrors active ReportFilterBar state (classCode, subjectCode, from, to) per 14-listing §10.1 and API design §8.3
Verify CSV file download starts in-browser and URL remains on /admin/reports
Open downloaded CSV and verify rows match institution-wide filter scope within active date range
cases.expected: AC-13d satisfied: admin inline Xuất CSV on /admin/reports downloads CSV without /admin/export navigation; filters match on-screen report per 14-listing §10.1

cases.title: ExportService.exportCsv scopes rows to instructor ClassAssignment at DB boundary
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 (assigned) and HESD-02 / SWE-102 (unassigned to test instructor)
Instructor userId with ClassAssignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
ExportService enforces BR-08 assignment scope per reporting-export §2.6 and API design §8.3
steps: Seed attendance records for both HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102 within same date range
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorId) for assigned pair
Assert returned CSV contains only HESD-01 / SWE-101 rows and excludes HESD-02 / SWE-102 data
Assert CSV header and column mapping match API design §8.3
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from, to }, instructorId) for unassigned pair
Assert export raises authorization error or returns denial without leaking out-of-scope rows per BR-08
cases.expected: AC-13c module-integration: instructor scoped CSV export succeeds for assigned class-subject and rejects out-of-scope at service/repository boundary per tag-specific integration hint

cases.title: Instructor POST /reports/export for unassigned class-subject returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned only to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Attendance data exists for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed with localized permission error per BR-08 and BR-09
Assert response body is not text/csv and contains no out-of-scope attendance data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created with actor instructorId and denial reason per error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: BR-08 and BR-09 satisfied: instructor out-of-scope export denied with localized message and denied attempt logged; no data leak

cases.title: Flow C: CSV export writes ExportAuditLog verifiable via audit query
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Closed session attendance data exists for export filters
ExportAuditLog query endpoint or direct DB access available for verification
steps: Record ExportAuditLog count before export
POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and assert HTTP 200 CSV download
Query ExportAuditLog for new entry with actor adminId
Assert audit entry filterSummary matches request classCode, subjectCode, from, and to
Assert audit entry rowCount matches parsed CSV data row count
Confirm Flow C audit verification pattern per testing-plan coverage techniques for export actions
cases.expected: Flow C satisfied: successful CSV export produces verifiable ExportAuditLog entry with actor, filter params, and row count per NFR-15 and error-handling §6.2

cases.title: Instructor clicks inline Xuất CSV on /reports with assigned class-subject filters
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 on desktop viewport
Closed sessions with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 for June 2026
Instructor sidebar shows Báo cáo navigation per page-list §4.5
steps: Navigate to /reports
Set ReportFilterBar to class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, and date range 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 and click Áp dụng
Verify page header or toolbar displays enabled Xuất CSV button per AC-13c and 14-listing §10
Click Xuất CSV without navigating away from /reports
Verify POST /reports/export request body mirrors active ReportFilterBar state (classCode, subjectCode, from, to) per 14-listing §10.1 and API design §8.3
Verify CSV file download starts in-browser and URL remains on /reports
Open downloaded CSV and verify rows contain only HESD-01 / SWE-101 data with header columns institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at
cases.expected: AC-13c browser journey: instructor inline Xuất CSV on /reports downloads scoped CSV matching active filters per page-list §4.5 and 14-listing §10.1
